name: tablerizer
description: 🎲 Tablerizer - The PostgreSQL table export wizard! Generate SQL files for RBAC, RLS, triggers, and schema documentation

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push origin main && git push origin --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push origin main && git push origin --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push origin main && git push origin --tags
scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test --test-timeout=30000 test/generators.test.ts test/integration.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && node --import tsx --test --test-timeout=10000 test/generators.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node --import tsx --test --test-timeout=30000 test/integration.test.ts

author: louislec <louis@grinn.tech>
